name: IOC Enrichment Pipeline
description: Automated IOC enrichment pipeline that extracts all indicators (IPs, domains, hashes) from alert data, iterates over each IOC to enrich via VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan, then uses AI-powered correlation to identify patterns and threat actor TTPs. High-risk IOCs are automatically added to the threat intel EDL blocklist and an investigation ticket is created. Benign IOCs are annotated and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich IOCs with reputation data, detection ratios, and community scores

required_integrations.name: AbuseIPDB
required_integrations.reason: Check IP addresses against abuse reports and confidence scores

required_integrations.name: Shodan
required_integrations.reason: Gather infrastructure intelligence on IP addresses and exposed services

config.description: Triggers when a threat intel or IOC-related alert is ingested containing indicators to investigate

config.code:
import re

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

ip_pattern = r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b'
domain_pattern = r'\b(?:[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\.)+[a-zA-Z]{2,}\b'
md5_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{32}\b'
sha1_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{40}\b'
sha256_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{64}\b'

ips = list(set(re.findall(ip_pattern, raw_text)))
domains = list(set(re.findall(domain_pattern, raw_text)))
hashes = list(set(re.findall(md5_pattern, raw_text) + re.findall(sha1_pattern, raw_text) + re.findall(sha256_pattern, raw_text)))

iocs = []
for ip in ips:
    iocs.append({'type': 'ip', 'value': ip})
for domain in domains:
    iocs.append({'type': 'domain', 'value': domain})
for h in hashes:
    iocs.append({'type': 'hash', 'value': h})

result = {'iocs': iocs, 'total_count': len(iocs), 'ip_count': len(ips), 'domain_count': len(domains), 'hash_count': len(hashes)}
config.description: Extracts all IPs, domains, and file hashes from the alert data using regex pattern matching
Iterates over each extracted IOC to perform individual enrichment
Enriches each IOC against VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan for reputation and infrastructure data

config.additional_instructions: Correlate all enriched IOCs, identify patterns and threat actor TTPs. Highlight any indicators linked to known campaigns or APT groups.
config.description: AI-powered analysis correlating all enriched IOC data to identify patterns, threat actor TTPs, and campaign linkages
Routes based on whether any IOCs were assessed as high-risk or malicious by enrichment or AI analysis

data.label: Add to Threat Intel EDL Blocklist

config.description: Adds all high-risk IOCs to the External Dynamic List blocklist for automated blocking across security controls

create_ticket.title: IOC Investigation — High-Risk Indicators Detected

config.description: Creates an investigation ticket for SOC Tier 2 with full enrichment results and AI assessment
Adds a note documenting that all IOCs were assessed as benign with no action required
